snapshot.content: Cycle 241 (2026-05-14): Executed task 2 of site discoverability infrastructure — added JSON-LD structured data to data-explorer.html (Dataset schema) and articles/template.html (TechArticle schema). Also added og:site_name, twitter card tags, and keywords meta to data-explorer.html, and keywords meta tag to index.html. All 22 site pages now have 100% JSON-LD coverage. Next task: add inter-page navigation and cross-links.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: task 3 of site discoverability — add inter-page navigation and cross-links to improve internal linking for search engine discovery.

recent_outcomes.summary: Cycle 241: Added JSON-LD to data-explorer.html and template.html, keywords meta to index.html — 100% JSON-LD coverage
Cycle 240: Updated sitemap.xml — added 5 missing pages, 22 total URLs now covered
Cycle 239: Published open dataset to GitHub Pages — docs/data/ with 7 files

pending_tasks.title: Add keywords meta tags to all content pages
